---
title: Giving general labels
date: 2024-06-18
metadata-files: 
  - _metadata.yml
  - ../_quarto.yml
---

# Goal of this analysis

1. Combine the clusters together based on their newly assigned cell type based on gene expression.
2. Rerun SingleR workflow to see if results are better and more understandable

# Files and directories

## Input

CCA RL file is found at `/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240613/cca/combined_clusters_rl.qs`

Tumour dataset can be found at `/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/icheong/CBL_scRNAseq/results/tumour/Vladoiu/20230510/mb_mnn.rds`

## Output

The output can be found at `/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240618`

# Process and Results

Lets load in the required libraries
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(Seurat)
library(qs)
library(SingleR)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(SingleCellExperiment)
library(scran)
```

Loading in the Seurat objects.
```{r eval=FALSE}
# Loading in Seurat objects
rl_cca <- qread("/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240613/cca/combined_clusters_rl.qs")
tumour_srat <- readRDS("/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/icheong/CBL_scRNAseq/results/tumour/Vladoiu/20230510/mb_mnn.rds")

out_directory <- "/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240618"
```

My plan of action is to group general cell categories broadly. The groups will be RL, GCP, GC, GC defined, UBC, microglia, endothelial, oligodendrocyte/OPC. This grouping is done based on the results of `notes/_20240524.qmd` as well as the Jaccard Similarity matrix between RPCA and CCA integrations found at `/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240611/cca_0.4_rpca_0.2_jaccard_sim_heatmap.png`

Lets create a table matches the cluster number to the assigned cell type.
```{r eval=FALSE}
clusters <- c("Cluster_0", "Cluster_1", "Cluster_3", "Cluster_4", "Cluster_5", 
  "Cluster_6", "Cluster_7", "Cluster_8", "Cluster_9", "Cluster_10",
  "Cluster_11", "Cluster_12", "Cluster_13", "Cluster_14", "Cluster_15",  
  "Cluster_16", "Cluster_17", 
  "UBC_0", "UBC_1", "UBC_2", "UBC_3", "UBC_4", "UBC_5")

broad_w_ubc_subtypes <- c("GCP", "GC", "GC", "GC", "GCP",
  "GC", "GCP", "GC", "GC", "RL",
  "oligodendrocyte/OPC", "RL", "endothelial", "microglia", "oligodendrocyte/OPC",
  "GC", "GCP",
  "UBC_0", "UBC_1", "UBC_2", "UBC_3", "UBC_4", "UBC_5")

broad_cell_type <- c("GCP", "GC", "GC", "GC", "GCP",
  "GC", "GCP", "GC", "GC", "RL",
  "oligodendrocyte/OPC", "RL", "endothelial", "microglia", "oligodendrocyte/OPC",
  "GC", "GCP",
  "UBC", "UBC", "UBC", "UBC", "UBC", "UBC")

df <- data.frame(Cluster = clusters, broad_cell_type = broad_cell_type, broad_w_ubc_subtypes = broad_w_ubc_subtypes)

write.csv(df, file = file.path(out_directory, "clusters_cell_types.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
```

Now lets take those new annotations and create a column in the metadata.
```{r eval=FALSE}
original_cluster <- rl_cca$new_clusters
matching_indices <- match(original_cluster, df$Cluster)
rl_cca$broad_cell_type <- df$broad_cell_type[matching_indices]
rl_cca$broad_w_ubc_subtypes <- df$broad_w_ubc_subtypes[matching_indices]

rl_cca$broad_cell_type <- as.character(as.factor(rl_cca$broad_cell_type))
rl_cca$broad_w_ubc_subtypes <- as.character(as.factor(rl_cca$broad_w_ubc_subtypes))
```

Let's take a look at what the annotations look like.
```{r eval=FALSE}
plt <- DimPlot(rl_cca, reduction = "umap", label = TRUE, group.by = "broad_cell_type")
ggsave(filename = "broad_cell_type_umap.png", plot = plt, path = out_directory, 
            width = 10, height = 10, units = "in", dpi = 600)

plt <- DimPlot(rl_cca, reduction = "umap", label = TRUE, group.by = "broad_w_ubc_subtypes")
ggsave(filename = "rl_ubc_subtypes_umap.png", plot = plt, path = out_directory, 
            width = 10, height = 10, units = "in", dpi = 600)
```

![The broad cell types are looking good](/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240618/broad_cell_type_umap.png)

Now lets save the object
```{r eval=FALSE}
qsave(rl_cca, file.path(out_directory, "rl_cca.qs"))
```

The rest is done on the HPC

Lets convert the Seurat objects to SCE objects
```{r eval=FALSE}
# Subset out mice cells
rl_cca <- subset(x = rl_cca, subset = species == "human")

# Normalize RNA assay before converting
rl_cca <- NormalizeData(rl_cca, assay ="RNA")
tumour_srat  <- NormalizeData(tumour_srat, assay ="RNA")


rl_sce <- as.SingleCellExperiment(rl_cca)
tumour_sce <- as.SingleCellExperiment(tumour_srat)
```

The SingleR prediction
```{r eval=FALSE}
common <- intersect(rownames(rl_sce), rownames(tumour_sce))

trained_model <- trainSingleR(
  rl_sce[common,], 
  labels=rl_sce$broad_cell_type, 
  aggr.ref=FALSE, 
  de.method = "wilcox", 
  BPPARAM=MulticoreParam(8)
)

predict <- classifySingleR(
  test = tumour_sce[common,],
  trained = trained_model,
  assay.type=1,
  BPPARAM=MulticoreParam(8)
)
```

```{r eval=FALSE}
qsave(trained_model, file.path(out_directory, "trained_model.qs"))
qsave(predict, file.path(out_directory, "predictions.qs"))
```

Now lets take the results from the HPC and analyze the results.
```{r eval=FALSE}
prediction <- qread(file.path(out_directory, "predictions.qs"))
predict_heatmap <- plotScoreHeatmap(prediction)
ggsave(file.path(out_directory, "prediction_heatmap.png"), plot = predict_heatmap, width = 20, height = 20, units = "in", dpi = 600)
```

![The prediction heatmap of all the scores](/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240618/prediction_heatmap.png)

Lets look at the raw counts for each label
```{r eval=FALSE}
table(prediction$labels)

        endothelial                  GC                 GCP           microglia 
                131                 240                3123                1046 
oligodendrocyte/OPC                  RL                 UBC 
                 75                9847               13273 
```

```{r eval=FALSE}
predict_delta <- plotDeltaDistribution(prediction, ncol = 3)
ggsave(file.path(out_directory, "prediction_delta.png"), plot = predict_delta, width = 20, height = 20, units = "in", dpi = 600)
```

![The prediction delta distribution, Low deltas mean assignment is uncertain.](/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240618/prediction_delta.png)

Lets add the labels back to the tumour object
```{r eval=FALSE}
tumour_srat@meta.data$pred_label <- prediction$labels
```

Lets take a look at what the predicted labels looks like
```{r eval=FALSE}
plt <- DimPlot(tumour_srat, reduction = "umap", label = TRUE, repel = TRUE, group.by = "pred_label")
ggsave(filename = "tumour_pred_labels_umap.png", plot = plt, path = out_directory, 
            width = 10, height = 10, units = "in", dpi = 600)
```

![There seem to be a lot of UBCs](/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240618/tumour_pred_labels_umap.png)

Lets take a look at the cell breakdown
```{r eval=FALSE}
table(tumour_srat$subtype, tumour_srat$pred_label)

      endothelial   GC  GCP microglia oligodendrocyte/OPC   RL  UBC
  G3           33  119   58       586                  63 4500 3286
  G4           29    5   31       239                   6 3410 8185
  SHH          69  116 3034       221                   6 1937 1802
```

```{r eval=FALSE}
source("/u/llau/software/mb_scrnaseq/MB_scRNAseq/software/utilities/cluster_barplot.R")

tumour_bar_plot <- cluster_barplot(tumour_srat, split.by = "pred_label", group.by = "orig.ident")
bar_plot_name <- "tumour_bar_plot.png"
ggsave(filename = bar_plot_name, plot = tumour_bar_plot, path = out_directory, 
          width = 20, height = 10, units = "in", dpi = 600)

tumour_bar_plot <- cluster_barplot(tumour_srat, split.by = "pred_label", group.by = "orig.ident", position = "fill")
bar_plot_name <- "tumour_proportion_bar_plot.png"
ggsave(filename = bar_plot_name, plot = tumour_bar_plot, path = out_directory, 
          width = 20, height = 10, units = "in", dpi = 600)

subtype_bar_plot <- cluster_barplot(tumour_srat, split.by = "pred_label", group.by = "subtype")
bar_plot_name <- "subtype_bar_plot.png"
ggsave(filename = bar_plot_name, plot = subtype_bar_plot, path = out_directory, 
          width = 20, height = 10, units = "in", dpi = 600)

subtype_bar_plot <- cluster_barplot(tumour_srat, split.by = "pred_label", group.by = "subtype", position = "fill")
bar_plot_name <- "subtype_proportion_bar_plot.png"
ggsave(filename = bar_plot_name, plot = subtype_bar_plot, path = out_directory, 
          width = 20, height = 10, units = "in", dpi = 600)
```

I believe that by reducing the clusters, it seems to be over-predicting with the UBCs. It might be better to predict with all the clusters, and then combine the labels afterwards.

```{r eval=FALSE}
qsave(tumour_srat, file.path(out_directory, "predicted_labels_tumour.qs"))
```

I definitely need to create my own list of genes to differentiate between the clusters
